output.explanation: Value is missing the expected hyphenated ISSN-like structure seen in the other entries (e.g. 0091-0562, 0016-5085).
This value contains a lowercase letter appended to an otherwise numeric code, unlike the consistent ISSN-style patterns in the list (e.g. 1526-632X, 1943-569X).
This value is a concatenation of two ISSN-like values without a separator; other entries are single codes or formatted print/electronic pairs with clear separators.
This value includes a journal-type descriptor in parentheses and duplicates the same code, unlike the mostly plain ISSN-like values elsewhere.
This value is missing the standard hyphenated grouping seen in the other codes (e.g. 13598546 vs 1353-3452).
This value repeats the same ISSN-like code twice, while the rest are single codes or paired print/electronic forms.
This value combines two ISSN-like codes with extra text and spacing; other paired entries use a clearer single pattern like 'CODE (Print)     CODE'.
